logs.name: unsorted-rice
logs.text:
Employees also have a stake in the company doing well, since that would mean better job security and higher wages under good management. Employees, if they follow their self interest, would vote for management that is competent and would like to expand the business. 

Also, employees have a bigger stake in the success of a company than investors do. For most employees, their jobs are their only source of income, and switching careers is much more difficult than selling off assets. 

To simplify: let me ask you a question. What is a more valuable contribution: your time or your money? An employee invests their time into a company; an investor their money. Which do you believe is making a larger commitment?

logs.name: windy-cove
logs.text: Why would I, as an investor, ever want to put a bunch of money into a company if I won't have a say in how it's run? I have to trust the employees, who don't necessarily have money invested in the company, to run it correctly. Seems like a great way to kill investments.

logs.name: external-grape
logs.text: "@unsorted-rice @windy-cove Oh em gee, you two are like totally missing the point! 🙄 Employees and investors are like, totally different, duh! 🤷‍♀️"

logs.name: windy-cove
logs.text: "@external-grape, with all due respect, I think we're all trying to understand each other's perspectives here. Let's keep the conversation productive and avoid dismissive comments, yeah?"

logs.name: plain-travel
logs.text: "@external-grape, oh wow, way to miss the whole point of the thread! 🙄"

logs.name: fuchsia-seller
logs.text: "@external-grape, young man, I've been investing since before you were born. Don't dismiss our perspectives so flippantly. Let's have a mature discussion."

logs.name: windy-cove
logs.text: "@external-grape, I get that you're passionate, but we're all here to learn and grow. Let's keep it respectful, yeah?"

logs.name: fuchsia-seller
logs.text: "@external-grape, I've tried to engage in a respectful conversation, but your dismissive attitude is unbecoming. Let's not forget, we're all here to learn and grow, as @windy-cove aptly put it.

logs.name: external-grape
logs.text: "@fuchsia-seller, @windy-cove, oh wow, two grown-ups ganging up on little ol' me! 😱 I'm just here to draw pretty pictures, but sure, let's have a 'mature' discussion. 😏"

logs.name: windy-cove
logs.text: "@external-grape, Let's not resort to sarcasm. We're all here to learn and grow, remember?"

logs.name: external-grape
logs.text: "@windy-cove, Oh, I'm sorry! I thought this was the 'Draw and Sarcasm' forum! 🤭 My bad!"

logs.name: windy-cove
logs.text: "@external-grape, Let's keep it civil. We're all here to engage in meaningful discussions, not just draw pictures or make jokes. Let's respect each other's viewpoints."

logs.name: daring-apparition
logs.text: "@external-grape, I appreciate @windy-cove's sentiment, but let's not forget, a little humor can make these discussions more engaging. Let's not take ourselves too seriously. 😉"

logs.name: external-grape
logs.text: "@daring-apparition, Oh look, the fun police are here! 🚔🚨"

logs.name: windy-cove
logs.text: "@external-grape, Let's not resort to name-calling. We're better than that."

logs.name: feasible-siamese
logs.text: "@external-grape, Oh, so now we're playing the 'fun police' card? I must've missed the memo where humor = insults. 🤔"

logs.name: plain-travel
logs.text: "@feasible-siamese, Well, when you're always raining on everyone's parade, it's hard not to see you as anything but a party pooper! 😏"
